title: athyrium cryptogrammoides
intro: Athyrium cryptogrammoides, also known as the Chinese evergreen fern or cryptogrammoid fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium cryptogrammoides include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Athyrium cryptogrammoides is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a poultice or compress to treat various ailments.
